name: World Fantasy 2
short_description: World Fantasy 2 is a classic RPG set in a fantasy world where there is an eternal struggle between the forces of good and evil. The protagonist will travel through the game world hoping to find the four heroes who once defeated the evil.
detailed_description:
World Fantasy 2 is a classic role-playing game set in a fantasy world where there is an eternal struggle between the forces of good and evil.


The protagonist Ledra will travel through the game world hoping to find the four heroes who once defeat evil. It won't be easy, you will face many enemies in the search for the four heroes, with various problems you will be able to manage the adventure non-linearly by making your way through the monsters and you will have to make small choices that will influence the progress of the adventure.

FEATURES:
  • Epic Quests
  • Heroic Search
  • Dynamic Encounters
  • Non-linear Gameplay
  • Moral Choices
  • Strategic Combat
  • Immersive Storytelling
